summary: Record the production web bundle after connecting the AI panel to WorkbenchRuntime and the async platform SecretStore bridge.

decisions.decision: Treat the successful production bundle as compile/package evidence for the AI runtime bridge only; do not infer hosted provider or clean-browser acceptance from it.
decisions.rationale: The bundle validates module graph and TypeScript integration, while provider credentials, network policy, and external lifecycle remain separate evidence gates.

testEvidence.criterion: The runtime-wired AI surface compiles and bundles for the production web target.
testEvidence.test: Run the production build once after the runtime bridge aggregate green.

red.outcome: RED: no failed build was observed before this verification; the prior bundle predates the runtime bridge and is not used as evidence for this commit.

green.outcome: GREEN: tsc exited 0; Vite transformed 232 modules and completed in 352ms.

questions: MCP server work, hosted AI walkthrough, and remaining M4 acceptance gates remain pending.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
